---
title: "Gene_Set_Enrichment_Analysis_Placenta_20"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# ============================================
# STEP 1 — Read all six TSV files
# (positive and negative for each
# of your 3 databases)
# ============================================

# Set your base path
# UPDATE THIS to your actual GSEA output folders
tissue_20_female_hallmark_path <- here("data", "gsea", "2026_female_20_H")
tissue_20_female_gobp_path     <- here("data", "gsea", "2026_female_20_G")
tissue_20_female_kegg_path     <-here("data", "gsea", "2026_female_20_K")


tissue_20_male_hallmark_path <- here("data", "gsea", "2026_male_20_H")
tissue_20_male_gobp_path     <- here("data", "gsea", "2026_male_20_G")
tissue_20_male_kegg_path     <-here("data", "gsea", "2026_male_20_K")

```


```{r}
# Read Female Hallmark results
hallmark_pos_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_hallmark_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778370218036.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "Hallmark",
              direction = "Upregulated")

hallmark_neg_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_hallmark_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778370218036.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "Hallmark",
              direction = "Downregulated")

# Read Male Hallmark results
hallmark_pos_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_hallmark_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778370398649.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "Hallmark",
              direction = "Upregulated")

hallmark_neg_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_hallmark_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778370398649.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "Hallmark",
              direction = "Downregulated")

# Read Female GOBP results
gobp_pos_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_gobp_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778372324781.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "GOBP",
              direction = "Upregulated")

gobp_neg_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_gobp_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778372324781.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "GOBP",
              direction = "Downregulated")

# Read Male GOBP results
gobp_pos_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_gobp_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778371234947.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "GOBP",
              direction = "Upregulated")

gobp_neg_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_gobp_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778371234947.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "GOBP",
              direction = "Downregulated")

# Read Female KEGG results
kegg_pos_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_kegg_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778372296880.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "KEGG",
              direction = "Upregulated")

kegg_neg_female_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_female_kegg_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778372296880.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "KEGG",
              direction = "Downregulated")

# Read Male KEGG results
kegg_pos_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_kegg_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_pos_1778371906248.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "KEGG",
              direction = "Upregulated")

kegg_neg_male_20 <- read.delim(
  paste0(tissue_20_male_kegg_path,"/",
         "gsea_report_for_na_neg_1778371906248.tsv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>% mutate(database = "KEGG",
              direction = "Downregulated")
```

```{r}
# ============================================
# STEP 2 — Combine all results
# ============================================

tissue_gsea_20 <- bind_rows(
  hallmark_pos_female_20 %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  hallmark_neg_female_20 %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  hallmark_pos_male_20   %>% mutate(sex = "Male"),
  hallmark_neg_male_20   %>% mutate(sex = "Male"),
  gobp_pos_female_20     %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  gobp_neg_female_20     %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  gobp_pos_male_20       %>% mutate(sex = "Male"),
  gobp_neg_male_20       %>% mutate(sex = "Male"),
  kegg_pos_female_20     %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  kegg_neg_female_20     %>% mutate(sex = "Female"),
  kegg_pos_male_20       %>% mutate(sex = "Male"),
  kegg_neg_male_20       %>% mutate(sex = "Male")
)

colnames(tissue_gsea_20)

```


```{r}
# ============================================
# STEP 3 — Filter significant pathways (sorted by NES)
# ============================================

sig_gsea_tissue_20 <- tissue_gsea_20 %>%
  filter(FDR.q.val < 0.1) %>%
  arrange(database, desc(NES))

cat("Total significant pathways:", nrow(sig_gsea_tissue_20), "\n")
cat("\nBreakdown by database:\n")
print(table(sig_gsea_tissue_20$database, sig_gsea_tissue_20$direction, sig_gsea_tissue_20$sex))
print(table(sig_gsea_tissue_20$database, sig_gsea_tissue_20$direction))
```


# NES Plots Per Collection 
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# GSEA NES Bar Charts — One Per Collection
# =============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Settings ----------------------------------------------------------------
top_n    <- 20
col_up   <- "#2980B9"
col_down <- "#C0392B"

# --- Prepare data ------------------------------------------------------------
# --- Prepare data split by sex -----------------------------------------------
gsea_clean_female_20 <- sig_gsea_tissue_20 %>%
  filter(sex == "Female") %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_label = NAME %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_remove("^GOBP ") %>%
      str_remove("^HALLMARK ") %>%
      str_remove("^KEGG ") %>%
      str_to_title() %>%
      str_wrap(width = 45),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated"))
  )

gsea_clean_male_20 <- sig_gsea_tissue_20 %>%
  filter(sex == "Male") %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_label = NAME %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_remove("^HALLMARK ") %>%
      str_to_title() %>%
      str_wrap(width = 45),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated"))
  )

# --- Plot function (unchanged) ------------------------------------------------
plot_nes <- function(df, db, sex_label) {
  
  plot_df <- df %>%
    filter(database == db) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(pathway_label = fct_reorder(pathway_label, NES))
  
  x_max <- ceiling(max(abs(plot_df$NES), na.rm = TRUE) + 0.5)
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = NES, y = pathway_label, fill = direction)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_text(
      aes(
        label = paste0("FDR=", formatC(FDR.q.val, format = "e", digits = 1)),
        hjust = ifelse(NES > 0, -0.08, 1.08)
      ),
      size = 2.7, color = "grey30"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Upregulated" = col_up, "Downregulated" = col_down),
      name = "Direction", drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-x_max, x_max),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.25))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(sex_label, " — ", db, " GSEA Normalized Enrichment Scores"),
      x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 9, color = "black"),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.4),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      plot.margin        = margin(10, 20, 10, 10)
    )
}

# --- Generate plots ----------------------------------------------------------

# Female — all three collections
p_female_gobp_20     <- plot_nes(gsea_clean_female_20, "GOBP",     "Female")
p_female_hallmark_20 <- plot_nes(gsea_clean_female_20, "Hallmark", "Female")
p_female_kegg_20     <- plot_nes(gsea_clean_female_20, "KEGG",     "Female")

# Male — Hallmark only
p_male_hallmark_20   <- plot_nes(gsea_clean_male_20,   "Hallmark", "Male")

print(p_female_gobp_20)
print(p_female_hallmark_20)
print(p_female_kegg_20)
print(p_male_hallmark_20)

# --- Save --------------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave("Figure_GSEA_20_Female_GOBP_NES.tiff",     p_female_gobp_20,
       path = here("output", "figures"),
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 1200, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw")

ggsave("Figure_GSEA_20_Female_Hallmark_NES.tiff", p_female_hallmark_20,
       path = here("output", "figures"),
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 1200, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw")

ggsave("Figure_GSEA_20_Female_KEGG_NES.tiff",     p_female_kegg_20,
       path = here("output", "figures"),
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 1200, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw")

ggsave("Figure_GSEA_20_Male_Hallmark_NES.tiff",   p_male_hallmark_20,
       path = here("output", "figures"),
       width = 8, height = 4, units = "in", dpi = 1200, device = "tiff", compression = "lzw")

write.csv(
  sig_gsea_tissue_20,
  file = here("output", "placenta", "sig_gsea_placenta_20.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
```{r}
ls()
```
```{r}
colnames(sig_gsea_cells)
head(sig_gsea_cells, 3)
```

```{r}
# ============================================
# View upregulated pathways first
# (only 20 — manageable to look at all)
# ============================================

cat("=== UPREGULATED PATHWAYS (n=20) ===\n")
up_pathways <- sig_gsea %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  select(NAME, NES, NOM.p.val,
         FDR.q.val, SIZE, database)

View(up_pathways)

# ============================================
# View top downregulated pathways
# Sort by most negative NES
# ============================================

cat("\n=== TOP 30 DOWNREGULATED PATHWAYS ===\n")
down_pathways <- sig_gsea %>%
  filter(direction == "Downregulated") %>%
  arrange(NES) %>%     # most negative first
  select(NAME, NES, NOM.p.val,
         FDR.q.val, SIZE, database) %>%
  head(30)

View(down_pathways)

# ============================================
# View Hallmark specifically
# Most interpretable database
# Good starting point for story
# ============================================

cat("\n=== HALLMARK RESULTS ===\n")
hallmark_sig <- sig_gsea %>%
  filter(database == "Hallmark") %>%
  arrange(NES) %>%
  select(NAME, NES, NOM.p.val,
         FDR.q.val, SIZE, direction)

View(hallmark_sig)

# ============================================
# SAVE ALL TO CSV — easiest to work with
# ============================================

write.csv(
  gsea_clean_female %>%
    arrange(database,
            direction,
            desc(abs(NES))) %>%
    select(NAME, NES, NOM.p.val,
           FDR.q.val, SIZE,
           LEADING.EDGE,
           database, direction),
  file = here("output", "placenta", "female_GSEA_significant_pathways.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("CSV saved! Open in Excel to explore.\n")

```
# Creating NES Bar Charts- One Per Collection 

```{r}

```

```{r}
# Get complete list of all pathway names to assign biological themes correctly 
# All upregulated pathways
cat("=== ALL UPREGULATED PATHWAYS ===\n")
all_up <-  gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  select(NAME, NES, FDR.q.val, database)

write.csv(
  all_up,
  here("output", "placenta", "female_all_upregulated_pathways.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# All downregulated pathways
cat("=== ALL DOWNREGULATED PATHWAYS ===\n")
all_down <-  gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Downregulated") %>%
  arrange(NES) %>%
  select(NAME, NES, FDR.q.val, database)

write.csv(
  all_down,
  here("output", "placenta", "female_all_downregulated_pathways.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("Both CSVs saved!\n")
cat("Upregulated pathways:", nrow(all_up), "\n")
cat("Downregulated pathways:", nrow(all_down), "\n")

```
```{r}
# ============================================
# EXTRACT KEYWORDS FROM PATHWAY NAMES
# Helps you see what themes naturally
# emerge from YOUR specific data
# ============================================

# Get all pathway names
all_names <-  gsea_clean_female$NAME

# Remove database prefix
# (HALLMARK_, GOBP_, KEGG_)
clean_names <- all_names %>%
  str_remove("^HALLMARK_") %>%
  str_remove("^GOBP_") %>%
  str_remove("^KEGG_")

# Split into individual words
all_words <- clean_names %>%
  str_split("_") %>%
  unlist() %>%
  tolower() %>%
  # Remove very common uninformative words
  .[!. %in% c("of", "to", "in", "the",
               "and", "or", "via", "by",
               "with", "from", "a", "an",
               "process", "regulation",
               "positive", "negative",
               "involved", "response",
               "dependent", "mediated",
               "pathway", "signaling",
               "activity", "based")] %>%
  table() %>%
  sort(decreasing = TRUE)

# Show top 50 most common words
cat("=== TOP 50 KEYWORDS IN YOUR PATHWAYS ===\n")
print(head(all_words, 50))
```
```{r}
# Print all pathway names cleanly
# so we can verify theme assignment

# === FEMALE ===

cat("=== UPREGULATED HALLMARK (n=5) ===\n")
gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated", database == "Hallmark") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")

cat("\n\n=== UPREGULATED KEGG (n=7) ===\n")
gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated", database == "KEGG") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")

cat("\n\n=== UPREGULATED GOBP TOP 30 of 316 ===\n")
gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated", database == "GOBP") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  head(30) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")

cat("\n\n=== DOWNREGULATED HALLMARK (n=13) ===\n")
gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Downregulated", database == "Hallmark") %>%
  arrange(NES) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")

cat("\n\n=== DOWNREGULATED KEGG (n=16) ===\n")
gsea_clean_female %>%
  filter(direction == "Downregulated", database == "KEGG") %>%
  arrange(NES) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")

# No downregulated GOBP pathways

# === MALE ===

cat("\n\n=== MALE UPREGULATED HALLMARK (n=3) ===\n")
gsea_clean_male %>%
  filter(direction == "Upregulated", database == "Hallmark") %>%
  arrange(desc(NES)) %>%
  pull(NAME) %>%
  cat(sep = "\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================
# ASSIGN BIOLOGICAL THEMES
# Built from your actual pathway names
# ============================================

sig_gsea_themed <- sig_gsea %>%
  mutate(
    theme = case_when(

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 1 — Immune & Inflammatory Activation
      # TNFα, NF-κB, cytokines, NOD receptors,
      # JAK-STAT, hematopoietic, allograft (Hallmark)
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "TNFA_SIGNALING|INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE|",
        "NOD_LIKE_RECEPTOR|CYTOKINE|",
        "HEMATOPOIETIC|JAK_STAT|",
        "HALLMARK_ALLOGRAFT|KRAS_SIGNALING_UP|",
        "INTERLEUKIN|CHEMOTAXIS|",
        "INNATE_IMMUNE|COMPLEMENT|",
        "COAGULATION|GRANULOCYTE|",
        "MACROPHAGE|NEUTROPHIL|",
        "NATURAL_KILLER|DENDRITIC"
      )) ~ "Immune &\nInflammatory Activation",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 2 — T Cell & Lymphocyte Development
      # Separate from general immune — large GOBP group
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "T_CELL|THYMOCYTE|T_HELPER|",
        "REGULATORY_T|CD4_POSITIVE|",
        "CD8_POSITIVE|ALPHA_BETA_T|",
        "T_CELL_LINEAGE|T_CELL_SELECTION|",
        "LYMPHOCYTE|LEUKOCYTE_DIFFER|",
        "ADAPTIVE_IMMUNE"
      )) ~ "T Cell &\nLymphocyte Development",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 3 — Interferon & Antigen Response (DOWN)
      # Interferon alpha/gamma, antigen processing,
      # autoimmune thyroid, KEGG allograft
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "INTERFERON|ANTIGEN_PROCESSING|",
        "AUTOIMMUNE|MHC|ANTIVIRAL|",
        "KEGG_ALLOGRAFT|PRION"
      )) ~ "Interferon &\nAntigen Response",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 4 — Hormonal & Reproductive
      # Estrogen, ovulation, gonadotropin,
      # sex differentiation — all female-specific
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "ESTROGEN|ANDROGEN|OVULATION|",
        "GONADOTROPIN|SEX_DIFFERENTIATION|",
        "FEMALE_SEX|MALE_SEX|",
        "REPRODUCTIVE|PROGESTERONE|",
        "PROLACTIN|HORMONE_METABOL"
      )) ~ "Hormonal &\nReproductive",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 5 — Smooth Muscle, Vascular & Cardiac
      # Must come BEFORE Development to catch
      # smooth muscle differentiation pathways
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "SMOOTH_MUSCLE|VASCULAR_SMOOTH|",
        "MUSCLE_CONTRACTION|MYOGENESIS|",
        "MUSCLE_HYPERTROPHY|STRIATED_MUSCLE|",
        "CARDIAC|ENDOCARDIAL|VALVE|",
        "ANGIOGEN|BLOOD_VESSEL|",
        "VASODILATION|HEART_MORPHO|",
        "HEART_DEVELOPMENT"
      )) ~ "Smooth Muscle,\nVascular & Cardiac",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 6 — Development & Organogenesis
      # Dominant GOBP upregulated theme —
      # embryonic, morphogenesis, organ, cell fate
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "EMBRYONIC|MORPHOGENESIS|",
        "ORGAN_INDUCTION|DEVELOPMENTAL_INDUCTION|",
        "MESENCHYME|MESENCHYMAL_CELL|",
        "CELL_FATE|AXIS_ELONGATION|",
        "PROXIMAL_DISTAL|ORGAN_IDENTITY|",
        "ORGAN_FORMATION|ORGAN_DEVELOPMENT|",
        "BRANCH_ELONGATION|PATTERN_FORMATION|",
        "ORGANOGENESIS|GASTRULATION|",
        "TISSUE_MORPHOGENESIS|",
        "ANIMAL_ORGAN_MORPHOGENESIS|",
        "ANIMAL_ORGAN_DEVELOPMENT|",
        "DIGESTIVE_TRACT_DEVELOPMENT|",
        "GLAND_DEVELOPMENT|LIMB_DEVELOP|",
        "KIDNEY_DEVELOP|LUNG_DEVELOP|",
        "SPECIFICATION|INDUCTION|",
        "CELL_DIFFERENTIATION|SOMITO"
      )) ~ "Development &\nOrganogenesis",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 7 — Cell Growth, Proliferation & Signaling
      # MYC, E2F, mTORC1, KRAS, cell cycle,
      # STAT signaling, cell adhesion (trophoblast)
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "MYC_TARGETS|E2F_TARGETS|MTORC1|",
        "CELL_PROLIFERATION|CELL_MIGRATION|",
        "CELL_GROWTH|CELL_CYCLE|",
        "RECEPTOR_SIGNALING_VIA_STAT|",
        "GROWTH_FACTOR|APOPTOSIS|",
        "PI3K|WNT|NOTCH|TGF_BETA|",
        "HEDGEHOG|CELL_ADHESION|",
        "SPLICEOSOM"
      )) ~ "Cell Growth,\nProliferation & Signaling",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 8 — Hypoxia & Oxidative Stress
      # Upregulated in MALE, downregulated in FEMALE
      # Key sex-specific reversal finding
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "HYPOXIA|REACTIVE_OXYGEN|",
        "OXIDATIVE_STRESS|UV_RESPONSE|",
        "RESPONSE_TO_HYPOXIA|HIF"
      )) ~ "Hypoxia &\nOxidative Stress",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 9 — Metabolic Suppression (DOWN female)
      # Glycolysis, fatty acids, amino acids,
      # lipid biosynthesis, xenobiotic
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "GLYCOLYSIS|GLUCONEOGENESIS|",
        "FATTY_ACID|BILE_ACID|",
        "CHOLESTEROL|XENOBIOTIC|",
        "PEROXISOME|DRUG_METABOL|",
        "HISTIDINE|LYSINE_DEGRAD|",
        "ARGININE|GLYCINE_SERINE|",
        "BIOSYNTHESIS_OF_UNSATURATED|",
        "GLYCEROLIPID|GPI_ANCHOR|",
        "N_GLYCAN|GLYCAN_BIOSYN|",
        "AMINO_ACID_CATABOL|",
        "OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION|",
        "CARBON_METABOL|LIPID_METABOL"
      )) ~ "Metabolic\nSuppression",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 10 — RNA Processing & Ribosome Biogenesis
      # rRNA maturation LSU/SSU — large GOBP group
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "RRNA|RIBOSOM|RNA_SPLICING|",
        "RNA_PROCESSING|MATURATION_OF_LSU|",
        "MATURATION_OF_SSU|TRNA_PROCESS|",
        "MRNA_PROCESS|RNA_CATABOL"
      )) ~ "RNA Processing &\nRibosome Biogenesis",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 11 — Calcium & Ion Transport
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "CALCIUM_ION|CALCIUM_IMPORT|",
        "ION_IMPORT|ION_TRANSPORT|",
        "POTASSIUM_ION|SODIUM_ION|",
        "CALCIUM_SIGNALING|",
        "INTRACELLULAR_CALCIUM"
      )) ~ "Calcium &\nIon Transport",

      # ----------------------------------------
      # THEME 12 — Protein Processing & Lysosome
      # ----------------------------------------
      str_detect(NAME, paste0(
        "LYSOSOME|PROTEASOM|",
        "UNFOLDED_PROTEIN|AUTOPHAGY|",
        "UBIQUITIN|PROTEIN_CATABOL"
      )) ~ "Protein Processing\n& Lysosome",

      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

# ============================================
# VERIFY — Breakdown by theme AND sex
# ============================================

cat("=== THEME ASSIGNMENT SUMMARY BY SEX ===\n")
print(table(sig_gsea_themed$theme, sig_gsea_themed$sex))

cat("\n=== CHECK FOR UNASSIGNED PATHWAYS ===\n")
unassigned <- sig_gsea_themed %>%
  filter(theme == "Other") %>%
  select(NAME, database, direction, sex)

if (nrow(unassigned) == 0) {
  cat("All pathways successfully assigned!\n")
} else {
  cat("WARNING:", nrow(unassigned), "pathways not assigned:\n")
  print(unassigned)
}

cat("\n=== PATHWAYS BY THEME ===\n")
sig_gsea_themed %>%
  select(NAME, theme, direction, sex, NES, database) %>%
  arrange(theme, sex, direction, desc(abs(NES))) %>%
  group_by(theme) %>%
  group_walk(~ {
    cat("\n---", .y$theme, "---\n")
    print(as.data.frame(.x[, c("NAME", "NES", "direction", "sex", "database")]))
  })

```

```{r}
# Just run this part first
cat("=== THEME ASSIGNMENT SUMMARY ===\n")
print(table(sig_gsea_themed$theme))

cat("\n=== UNASSIGNED PATHWAYS ===\n")
unassigned <- sig_gsea_themed %>%
  filter(theme == "Other") %>%
  select(NAME, database, direction)
print(unassigned)
```

```{r}
# ============================================
# STEP 7 — Make a dot plot by theme
# ============================================

# ============================================
# DOT PLOT — Female (main figure)
# Top 2 per theme per direction
# ============================================

top_female <- sig_gsea_themed %>%
  filter(sex == "Female") %>%
  group_by(theme, direction) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(NES), n = 2, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    NAME_clean = NAME %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_remove("^(HALLMARK |KEGG |GOBP )") %>%
      str_to_title() %>%
      str_wrap(width = 40)
  )

dot_plot_female <- ggplot(
  top_female,
  aes(x     = NES,
      y     = reorder(NAME_clean, NES),
      color = direction,
      size  = -log10(FDR.q.val + 1e-4))
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Upregulated" = "#2980B9", "Downregulated" = "#C0392B"),
    name   = "Direction"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(2, 7)) +
  facet_wrap(~ theme, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Female Placenta — GSEA Results by Biological Theme\n20uM PFBS vs. Control",
    x     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.5, color = "black"),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(dot_plot_female)

ggsave(
  filename    = "Figure_GSEA_Female_Themes_Dotplot.tiff",
  plot        = dot_plot_female,
  path        = here("output", "figures"),
  width       = 12,
  height      = 14,
  units       = "in",
  dpi         = 1200,
  device      = "tiff",
  compression = "lzw"
)

# ============================================
# DOT PLOT — Male (3 pathways only)
# ============================================

male_plot_data <- sig_gsea_themed %>%
  filter(sex == "Male") %>%
  mutate(
    NAME_clean = NAME %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_remove("^HALLMARK ") %>%
      str_to_title()
  )

dot_plot_male <- ggplot(
  male_plot_data,
  aes(x     = NES,
      y     = reorder(NAME_clean, NES),
      color = direction,
      size  = -log10(FDR.q.val + 1e-4))
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Upregulated" = "#2980B9", "Downregulated" = "#C0392B"),
    name   = "Direction"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(4, 9)) +
  labs(
    title = "Male Placenta — GSEA Significant Pathways\n20uM PFBS vs. Control (Hallmark only)",
    x     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
    y     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(dot_plot_male)

ggsave(
  filename    = "Figure_GSEA_Male_Themes_Dotplot.tiff",
  plot        = dot_plot_male,
  path        = here("output", "figures"),
  width       = 7,
  height      = 4,
  units       = "in",
  dpi         = 1200,
  device      = "tiff",
  compression = "lzw"
)
```
